title: Query Last Viewed across a lot of Boards (100+) to find out who has accessed a Board
excerpt: I’m trying to find out the list of people who Last Viewed a Board. I see from the Activity Log a Tab called “Last Viewed” but I cannot find a GraphQL API query to get this information. I know about getting the informatio…

posts.author: kwiatks (Stefan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to find out the list of people who Last Viewed a Board. I see from the Activity Log a Tab called “Last Viewed” but I cannot find a GraphQL API query to get this information. I know about getting the information about a row being last updated but I just want to see who even viewed a Board. I have 45 Boards at the moment and there is another requirement to add another 100 more.

I wish to have a dashboard of Board vs User who Last Viewed so can see the usage.

Any help appreciated.
